name: Blue Line Protection Group, Inc.
business: Blue Line Protection Group, Inc. provides armed protection and transportation, banking, compliance, and training services to the lawful cannabis industry, including shipment protection, money escorts, asset vaulting and transportation and storage of currency.

exposures.sentence: The Company provides armed protection and transportation, banking, compliance, and training services to the lawful cannabis industry, including shipment protection, money escorts, asset vaulting and transportation and storage of currency.
